content.explanation:
**There is / There are — Existence batana:**

"There is/are" ka use hota hai jab hum batate hain ki koi cheez **exist karti hai** ya **kisi jagah hai**.

🇮🇳 मेज़ पर एक किताब है।
🇬🇧 **There is** a book on the table.

🇮🇳 पार्क में बहुत बच्चे हैं।
🇬🇧 **There are** many children in the park.

**Key:** Subject ke hisaab se verb decide hoti hai
- Singular noun → There **is**
- Plural noun → There **are**
rules: Negative: There is no... / There are no... / There is not any...
"There" = existential placeholder (real subject baad mein aata hai)
content.memoryTrick:
**"S = S"** — Singular noun → There **i**S (S for Singular)
Plural noun → There **are** (A for All/plural)

examples.english: There is milk in the fridge.
There are 50 seats in the bus.
There were 3 rooms in that house.
There will be a meeting tomorrow.

speakingTips: Kisi jagah describe karte waqt: "There is a park near my house"
Problems batate waqt: "There is a problem with this"
Options batate waqt: "There are many ways to learn English"

vocabulary.example: There is a shortage of water.
There is an abundance of talent.

practice.hindi: मेज़ पर एक किताब है।
practice.english: There is a book on the table.
alternatives: there is a book on the table.

practice.hindi: पार्क में बहुत बच्चे हैं।
practice.english: There are many children in the park.
alternatives: there are lots of children in the park.
practice.hint: There are + many + plural noun + place

practice.hindi: फ्रिज में खाना नहीं है।
practice.english: There is no food in the fridge.
alternatives: there isn't any food in the fridge.
there is no food in the refrigerator.

practice.hindi: क्या बाहर कोई है?
practice.english: Is there anyone outside?
alternatives: is there somebody outside?

practice.hindi: कमरे में दो बिस्तर हैं।
practice.english: There are two beds in the room.
alternatives: there are 2 beds in the room.

practice.hindi: गली में बहुत ट्रैफिक है।
practice.english: There is a lot of traffic on the road.
alternatives: there is heavy traffic on the road.
practice.hint: There is a lot of + noun + place

practice.hindi: कल परीक्षा है।
practice.english: There is an exam tomorrow.
alternatives: there is a test tomorrow.

practice.hindi: इस शहर में तीन बड़े मॉल हैं।
practice.english: There are three big malls in this city.
alternatives: there are 3 large malls in this city.
practice.hint: There are + number + adjective + noun + place

practice.hindi: पार्किंग में कोई जगह नहीं है।
practice.english: There is no space in the parking.
alternatives: there isn't any space in the parking lot.
there is no parking space.

practice.hindi: क्या इस शहर में कोई अच्छा रेस्टोरेंट है?
practice.english: Is there a good restaurant in this city?
alternatives: are there any good restaurants in this city?
practice.hint: Is there + article + adjective + noun + place?

practice.hindi: कल कोई मीटिंग नहीं है।
practice.english: There is no meeting tomorrow.
alternatives: there isn't any meeting tomorrow.
there will be no meeting tomorrow.

practice.hindi: इस रास्ते में एक खतरनाक मोड़ है।
practice.english: There is a dangerous turn on this road.
alternatives: there is a risky curve on this road.
practice.hint: There is + article + adjective + noun + place

practice.hindi: क्या यहाँ कोई डॉक्टर है?
practice.english: Is there a doctor here?
alternatives: is there any doctor here?

practice.hindi: इस विषय में बहुत कुछ सीखने को है।
practice.english: There is a lot to learn in this subject.
alternatives: there is much to learn in this subject.
practice.hint: There is a lot + to + verb + place

practice.hindi: पिछले साल इस जगह पर एक पेड़ था।
practice.english: There was a tree here last year.
alternatives: last year there was a tree here.
practice.hint: There was + article + noun + place + time

practice.hindi: यहाँ बहुत शोर था।
practice.english: There was a lot of noise here.
alternatives: there was so much noise here.
practice.hint: There was + a lot of + noun

practice.hindi: क्या उस घर में कोई था?
practice.english: Was there anyone in that house?
alternatives: was there somebody in that house?

practice.hindi: शहर में तब बहुत कम बिजली थी।
practice.english: There was very little electricity in the city then.
alternatives: there was hardly any electricity in the city back then.
practice.hint: There was very little + noun + place

practice.hindi: अगले हफ्ते एक बड़ी सेल होगी।
practice.english: There will be a big sale next week.
alternatives: there is going to be a big sale next week.
practice.hint: There will be + article + adjective + noun + time

practice.hindi: कल और बारिश होगी।
practice.english: There will be more rain tomorrow.
alternatives: it will rain more tomorrow.

practice.hindi: इस मुद्दे पर बहुत बहस होगी।
practice.english: There will be a lot of debate on this issue.
alternatives: there will be much discussion on this issue.
practice.hint: There will be + noun + on + issue

practice.hindi: मैच में कोई दर्शक नहीं था।
practice.english: There were no spectators at the match.
alternatives: there was no audience at the match.
practice.hint: There were no + noun + at + event

practice.hindi: घर में तीन बाथरूम हैं।
practice.english: There are three bathrooms in the house.
alternatives: the house has three bathrooms.

practice.hindi: क्या कोई शिकायत है?
practice.english: Is there any complaint?
alternatives: are there any complaints?
do you have any complaints?

practice.hindi: खाने में कुछ गड़बड़ है।
practice.english: There is something wrong with the food.
alternatives: there is a problem with the food.
practice.hint: There is something wrong with + noun

practice.hindi: कल का कार्यक्रम रद्द हो गया।
practice.english: There is no program tomorrow.
alternatives: tomorrow's event has been cancelled.
there will be no event tomorrow.

practice.hindi: आसमान में बादल हैं।
practice.english: There are clouds in the sky.
alternatives: the sky has clouds.
practice.hint: There are + noun + in the sky

practice.hindi: इस कमरे में रोशनी कम है।
practice.english: There is not enough light in this room.
alternatives: there is less light in this room.
practice.hint: There is not enough + noun + place

practice.hindi: रास्ते में कई गड्ढे हैं।
practice.english: There are many potholes on the road.
alternatives: the road has many potholes.

practice.hindi: इस कंपनी में विकास के बहुत अवसर हैं।
practice.english: There are many growth opportunities in this company.
alternatives: this company has many growth opportunities.

practice.hindi: इस मुहल्ले में एक भी दुकान नहीं है।
practice.english: There is not a single shop in this locality.
alternatives: there are no shops in this neighbourhood.
practice.hint: There is not a single + noun + place

practice.hindi: क्या रसोई में चीनी है?
practice.english: Is there sugar in the kitchen?
alternatives: is there any sugar in the kitchen?

practice.hindi: इस किताब में बहुत सारी गलतियाँ हैं।
practice.english: There are many mistakes in this book.
alternatives: this book has many errors.

practice.hindi: बाहर बहुत ठंड है।
practice.english: There is a lot of cold outside.
alternatives: it is very cold outside.
practice.hint: There is + a lot of + noun

practice.hindi: क्या कल कोई छुट्टी है?
practice.english: Is there a holiday tomorrow?
alternatives: is tomorrow a holiday?

practice.hindi: इस देश में बहुत गरीबी है।
practice.english: There is a lot of poverty in this country.
alternatives: there is much poverty in this country.
practice.hint: There is a lot of + noun + place

practice.hindi: मंच पर कोई माइक नहीं था।
practice.english: There was no mic on the stage.
alternatives: there was no microphone on the stage.

practice.hindi: क्या पार्टी में कोई खास बात थी?
practice.english: Was there anything special at the party?
alternatives: was there something special at the party?

practice.hindi: भविष्य में और भी नई तकनीकें होंगी।
practice.english: There will be more new technologies in the future.
alternatives: there will be more new technology in the future.

practice.hindi: क्या अगले हफ्ते कोई कार्यक्रम होगा?
practice.english: Will there be any event next week?
alternatives: is there going to be an event next week?
practice.hint: Will there be + any + noun + time?
